info.name: SAP Sales and Distribution (SD) SAP Sales Contract API

description.content:
Create and manage sales contracts including quantity contracts and value contracts in SAP S/4HANA. This OData service (API_SALES_CONTRACT_SRV) supports contract lifecycle management from creation through fulfillment tracking, including header, item, partner, and pricing element entities.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support
